content:
IVX HOLDINGS — COMPLETE THE EXISTING EXPO REACT NATIVE APP ONLY

STOP any work on separate native Kotlin apps or alternate Android packages.

The only approved application is the existing IVX Holdings Expo React Native app.

APPROVED APP

- Framework: Expo React Native
- Existing project: current IVX Expo project
- Approved Android package: com.ivxholdings.app
- Approved architecture: one unified IVX Holdings app
- Expo Go for development testing
- EAS Build for production APK/AAB
- Vercel Exit Command Center must remain an Owner-only module inside this same app

DO NOT CREATE

- Another Android package
- Another Expo project
- A separate Kotlin app
- A dashboard-only app
- A Vercel-only app
- A replacement shell
- A second production app

==================================================
PHASE 1 — VERIFY THE CORRECT EXPO PROJECT
==================================================

Before changing code, verify and return:

1. Repository
2. Branch
3. Expo project root
4. package.json path
5. app.config.ts or app.json path
6. eas.json path
7. Expo Router root
8. Android package
9. iOS bundle identifier
10. EAS project ID
11. Current version
12. Current versionCode
13. Current Git SHA
14. Current API base URL
15. Current production environment

The correct Android package must be:

com.ivxholdings.app

If any current configuration uses:

com.rork.ivxholdings

freeze it and do not build it.

==================================================
PHASE 2 — PRESERVE ONE UNIFIED APP
==================================================

The final Expo app must include:

PUBLIC / MEMBER

- Home
- Registration
- Login
- Feed
- Properties
- Deals
- Reels
- Search
- Chat
- Notifications
- Profile
- Media upload

OWNER / ADMIN

- Owner Dashboard
- Members
- Investors
- Buyers
- Agents
- Revenue
- Transactions
- Analytics
- Variables
- Deployments
- Logs
- IVX Owner AI
- AI Engineering Command Center
- Vercel Exit Command Center
- Security
- Settings

The Vercel Exit Command Center is only a module inside Owner/Admin.

It must not replace the normal app entry point.

==================================================
PHASE 3 — EXPO GO QA
==================================================

Make the existing Expo app work correctly in Expo Go.

Verify:

1. App opens without crash
2. Expo Router loads the correct entry
3. Owner login is visible
4. Member login is visible
5. Feed loads
6. Properties load
7. Deals load
8. Reels load
9. Chat opens
10. Keyboard does not cover composer
11. Messages persist
12. Images upload
13. Videos upload
14. Owner AI responds
15. Realtime reconnect works
16. No stale watchdog timeout appears
17. No white banner or broken top spacing
18. No jumping feed or reels layout
19. Android and iOS routes match
20. Logout and restart work

Return exact failures only.

==================================================
PHASE 4 — FIX ALL EXPO ROOT CAUSES
==================================================

Audit and correct:

- Wrong app entry point
- Duplicate app.config files
- Duplicate package.json files
- Wrong Expo Router root
- Wrong initial route
- Wrong environment binding
- Wrong API URL
- Wrong package name
- Missing native permissions
- Missing Expo plugins
- Stale Metro cache assumptions
- Broken deep links
- Keyboard overlap
- Safe-area issues
- Watchdog stale state
- Chat mutation timeout
- Realtime reconnect failures
- Android/iOS module parity
- Missing Owner routes
- Dashboard-only redirects

Do not hide failures with placeholders.

==================================================
PHASE 5 — OWNER AI TIMEOUT FINALIZATION
==================================================

Verify every Owner AI send path uses one shared orchestrator.

Test:

- Send button
- Keyboard send
- Voice
- Attachment
- Deal Review
- Investor Reply
- Doc Summary
- Owner command
- Retry
- Offline recovery
- Resume after background
- Network switching

Required checkpoints:

USER_MESSAGE_ACCEPTED
AI_TRIGGER_DECISION
AI_MUTATION_STARTED
HTTP_REQUEST_STARTED
HTTP_RESPONSE_RECEIVED
RESPONSE_PERSISTED
UI_RENDERED
SUCCESS

No fire-and-forget requests.
No swallowed promise rejection.
No stale watchdog timer.
No infinite spinner.

==================================================
PHASE 6 — COMPLETE TESTING
==================================================

Run:

- TypeScript
- Lint
- Unit tests
- Integration tests
- Expo Router tests
- Authentication tests
- Chat tests
- Owner AI tests
- Realtime tests
- Media tests
- Android tests
- iOS static checks
- Production API checks

Return:

- Total tests
- Passed
- Failed
- Skipped
- Exact failing files
- Exact fixes applied

==================================================
PHASE 7 — PRODUCTION SYNCHRONIZATION
==================================================

Verify:

GitHub HEAD
=
Render Live SHA
=
/version SHA
=
Expo build embedded SHA

If they do not match, correct the release mismatch before building.

==================================================
PHASE 8 — BUILD THE REAL EXPO APP
==================================================

Use Expo EAS Build.

Generate:

- Android APK for direct installation
- Android AAB for Google Play
- iOS production build configuration

Use the existing EAS project.

Do not create a new EAS project unless runtime verification proves the existing project is unavailable.

Increment versionCode.

Required final filename:

ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build13.apk

or the next valid build number.

==================================================
PHASE 9 — VERIFY THE ACTUAL APK
==================================================

Inspect the built APK and verify it contains:

- Home
- Feed
- Properties
- Deals
- Reels
- Chat
- Members
- Investors
- Buyers
- Owner Dashboard
- Owner AI
- AI Engineering Command Center
- Vercel Exit Command Center
- Revenue
- Analytics
- Settings

Also verify:

- Package: com.ivxholdings.app
- Correct app name
- Correct icon
- Correct API URL
- Correct Git SHA
- Correct build number
- No com.rork.ivxholdings package
- No dashboard-only entry point

==================================================
PHASE 10 — DIRECT APK DELIVERY
==================================================

Return the actual APK as:

- A file attached in chat, or
- A public HTTPS download URL

Do not return only:

- /home/user/...
- /tmp/...
- a sandbox path
- screenshots
- a report without the APK

==================================================
FINAL ACCEPTANCE
==================================================

Complete only when:

1. One Expo React Native app remains
2. Package is com.ivxholdings.app
3. Expo Go works
4. Owner login works
5. Member login works
6. Feed, properties, deals and reels work
7. Chat works
8. Owner AI works with no timeout
9. Vercel dashboard is Owner-only
10. GitHub, Render, /version and build SHA match
11. APK is built through EAS
12. APK contains the full IVX app
13. APK is directly downloadable
14. No second app exists
15. No Kotlin replacement is used

FINAL RESPONSE

Return only:

- Correct Expo project path
- Package name
- Version
- versionCode
- Git SHA
- Render SHA
- /version SHA
- Test totals
- APK filename
- APK SHA-256
- Direct APK link or attachment
- Remaining real-device QA items

Do not create another application.
Finish the existing IVX Expo React Native app end to end.
